transcript.message: Hello, thank you for taking the time to speak with me today. My name is Rohan, and I'm a recruiter here at FinSpark, a fintech company that's passionate about leveraging AI to drive innovation in the financial sector. I'd love to learn more about your background and experience, so could you start by telling me a bit about your current role and what you've been working on lately?

I'm Reyansh Mehta, nice to speak with you, Rohan. Currently, I'm a Mechanical Engineer at Globex Inc, where I've been working on optimizing manufacturing processes using data-driven approaches. My focus has been on leveraging ETL tools and data visualization to improve efficiency and reduce costs.

That sounds like some really interesting work, Reyansh. Although your background is in Mechanical Engineering, it seems like you've been applying data-driven approaches to optimize processes. I'm curious, how do you think your skills and experience could translate to a role like this Senior AI Engineer position at FinSpark, where we're working with AI and machine learning to drive innovation in the fintech space?

While my background is in Mechanical Engineering, I've been fortunate to have worked on various projects that involved data analysis and visualization, which I believe can be applied to a role like this Senior AI Engineer position. My experience with ETL tools and data visualization has given me a solid foundation in working with data, and I'm excited about the prospect of applying my skills to a more AI-focused role.

It's great to hear that you're excited about the prospect of applying your skills to a more AI-focused role, Reyansh. What specifically drew you to this Senior AI Engineer position at FinSpark, and what do you think you can bring to our team in terms of your skills and experience?

I was drawn to this role at FinSpark because of the company's focus on leveraging AI to drive innovation in the financial sector, which aligns with my interest in exploring the applications of AI in various industries. I believe my experience with data analysis and visualization, as well as my ability to work with various tools and technologies, would make me a strong fit for this role, and I'm excited about the opportunity to contribute to a team that's pushing the boundaries of what's possible with AI.

It sounds like you have a strong interest in the role and the company, Reyansh. Now that we've discussed your background and experience, I'd like to talk about compensation. Can you tell me what you're currently earning in your role at Globex Inc, and what you're expecting in terms of salary for a position like this Senior AI Engineer role at FinSpark?

I'm not comfortable discussing my current salary, Rohan. However, I can tell you that I'm open to discussing compensation for the Senior AI Engineer position at FinSpark. If you'd like to proceed, I'd be happy to discuss salary expectations in more detail.

Now that we've discussed compensation, I'd like to move on to your availability. Are you currently in a position to join FinSpark, or do you have any notice period or other commitments that would impact your ability to start work with us?
I'm currently a senior with 9 years of experience, and I do have a notice period of 60 days. I'd need to provide FinSpark with formal notice before making a transition to a new role.

Reyansh, it was an absolute pleasure speaking with you today. I appreciate the time you took to share your background and experience with me, and I'm excited about the potential fit between your skills and our team at FinSpark. I'll be in touch within the next few days to discuss next steps and answer any additional questions you may have. In the meantime, I wish you all the best in your career endeavors, and I look forward to the possibility of working together. Thank you again for your time, and I'll speak with you soon.

It was a pleasure speaking with you as well, Rohan. I appreciate the time you took to discuss the Senior AI Engineer position at FinSpark, and I'm looking forward to hearing from you soon. I wish you and the FinSpark team all the best in your endeavors, and I'm excited about the possibility of joining your team in the future. Thank you again for your time, and I'll be in touch soon.
